title: Alice Sheldon
content: Alice Bradley Sheldon (August 24, 1915 - May 19, 1987) was an American sci-fi author best known as James Tiptree Jr., a pen name she used for 20 years until her death in 1987. It was unknown to the public until in the 1970s that James Tiptree Jr. was female. For 3 years, she also used the pen name Raccoona Sheldon.
